name: mon-names-converter
description: Mon Names Converter – search and discover Mon, Burmese, and English name equivalents

scripts.db:seed:local: node scripts/csv-to-sql.js && wrangler d1 migrations apply mon-names-db --local
scripts.db:seed:remote: node scripts/csv-to-sql.js && wrangler d1 migrations apply mon-names-db --remote
scripts.db:studio: wrangler d1 execute mon-names-db --local --command='SELECT * FROM names LIMIT 10'
scripts.db:reset:local: wrangler d1 execute mon-names-db --local --command='DROP TABLE IF EXISTS aliases; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS name_aliases; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS suggestions; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS admin_sessions; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS admins; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS segment_variants; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS segments; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS names;' && wrangler d1 migrations apply mon-names-db --local
